description: Modern metropolis (Manhattan + outer boroughs) where Concord's emergent layer has begun to rewrite individuals at the biological level. Bio powers — purple shadow-reasoning energy, red-gold plasma manipulation, and other emergent-substrate abilities — are the dominant exotic capability. Tech and weapons are present but secondary. Magic doesn't work here at all (no metaphysical substrate to channel).

anchors.name: Kane Tower Comm Array
anchors.description: Luminary Industries' public comm tower. High bandwidth, high cost, all messages logged by Vesper.

anchors.name: The Phantom Node
anchors.description: An anchor Elias unconsciously seeded during the 72-hour awakening. Free to use if you can find it. Resonance signature must be flagged sympathetic to the Enforcers' Movement.

anchors.name: Public Neural Clinic Implant
anchors.description: Subsidized neural-implant access points in public clinics. Lower cost, monitored by Luminary's regulatory front company.
